name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a pot over low heat.
2. Add the onion and mushrooms to the pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
3. Sprinkle the flour over the mixture and cook for a few minutes more.
4. Gradually add the chicken broth, stirring until it reaches a boil.
5. Reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Stir in the heavy cream and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Reheat before serving. If desired, make cold mushroom soup by chilling the mixture after adding the cream. Adjust the seasoning and serve in bowls sprinkled with chives.
